3307710.name: Grove
3307710.description: Grove is a cozy tower defense game where you nurture a small forest under siege by lumberjacks. Plant and upgrade trees with unique abilities to protect your grove. Customize and decorate your forest to enhance its calming atmosphere, while rhythmic music and sound effects help you unwind. Designed for relaxation, the game minimizes blue light to promote better sleep, offering a soothing escape as you build a natural haven from a single tree.
